slo_checks.name: post_repair_stale_evidence_rate
slo_checks.rationale: After repair, stale evidence should be close to zero in the controlled drift benchmark.

slo_checks.name: repair_success_rate
slo_checks.rationale: Targeted repair should succeed for most labeled stale-evidence failures.

slo_checks.name: post_repair_context_recall
slo_checks.rationale: Repair should not remove required supporting context.

slo_checks.name: post_repair_unsupported_claim_rate
slo_checks.rationale: Repair should not increase unsupported claims beyond a conservative baseline threshold.

slo_checks.name: mean_repair_latency_ms
slo_checks.rationale: Local repair should stay within an interactive debugging budget on a small benchmark.
